rationale: Renderers, sidecar metadata, back-state, DOMPurify sanitization, and binary affordances are present, but markdown intra-repo relative links are not rewritten to artifact routes — they remain raw relative .md hrefs that won't resolve to in-UI navigation.

findings.summary: AC2: relative intra-repo markdown links (e.g. `../features/FEAT-006.md`) are left as-is. SvelteKit client routing won't map them to artifact detail routes; clicking yields a 404 or full-page navigation rather than in-UI navigation. processMarkdownHtml only handles target=_blank for external; no resolution to /artifacts/:id.

AC4: Excalidraw iframe embeds https://excalidraw.com/embed without passing the artifact JSON, so the user sees an empty Excalidraw rather than the actual diagram. AC literal text is satisfied (iframe loads + offline fallback) but practical preview is missing.
AC1: no fixture artifacts added in diff to verify each mediaType end-to-end. Renderer logic exists per type but verification fixtures aren't visible.
